message:
feat(telemetry): unique parquet filenames and writer flush improvements

BatchedWriter now generates unique parquet filenames using a
timestamp and atomic counter to prevent file collisions when
multiple flush cycles execute within the same second:

  Format: <table>_<timestamp>_<counter>_<session_suffix>.parquet

Also includes:
  - AtomicU64 OUTPUT_FILE_COUNTER for monotonic uniqueness
  - Additional writer robustness improvements for the flush path
  - Beads issue tracker update from concurrent agent work

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
